# Brunei Administrative Divisions — Full Reference

> Last updated: 2026-05-27. License: CC-BY-4.0.

## Per-District Data Files

- [Belait](https://github.com/open-admin-data/brunei-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/belait-bn-be.txt) — 8 subdistricts, 83 villages
- [Tutong](https://github.com/open-admin-data/brunei-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/tutong-bn-tu.txt) — 9 subdistricts, 84 villages
- [Brunei-Muara](https://github.com/open-admin-data/brunei-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/brunei-muara-bn-bm.txt) — 19 subdistricts, 197 villages
- [Temburong](https://github.com/open-admin-data/brunei-administrative-divisions/blob/main/docs/llms-full/temburong-bn-te.txt) — 6 subdistricts, 74 villages

## Summary

| District | Subdistricts | Villages | 
|---|---|---|
| Belait | 8 | 83 | 
| Tutong | 9 | 84 | 
| Brunei-Muara | 19 | 197 | 
| Temburong | 6 | 74 |
